title: Tender Yeasty Thai Khanom Krok
description: Khanom Krok is a traditional Thai steamed cake dessert. Enjoy with a savory twist by using chinese sesame sauce.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine rice flour, yeast, sugar, and salt.
Gradually add warm water, stirring with a wooden spoon until a smooth batter forms.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let the mixture rest in a warm place for 1 hour.
Stir in chinese sesame sauce and mix well.
Divide the batter into 6 equal portions and shape each portion into a small cylinder.
Heat the robata grill over medium heat and grease with vegetable oil.
Place the cylinders on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings.
Repeat with remaining batter, if desired.
